sourceList.title: Marske in Swanedale. Yorkshire Archaeological Journal, 6, pp. 225. Google Books. Pedigree.

km.Sockburn, Durham, England: soកកប៊ើន, ដុរហាម, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Conyers Esq.於大約1437年出生在英國達勒姆索可本時，他的父親Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn17歲，母親Marjory Eure24歲。他和Lady Anne Bigod至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1490年9月8日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Conyers Esq.于大约1437年出生在英国達勒姆索可本时，他的父亲Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn17岁，母亲Marjory Eure24岁。他和Lady Anne Bigod至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1490年9月8日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Conyers Esq. was born about 1437, in Sockburn, Durham, England, his father, Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, was 17 and his mother, Marjory Eure, was 24. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Lady Anne Bigod. He died on 8 September 1490, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Conyers Esq. est né environ 1437, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Marjory Eure, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Lady Anne Bigod. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1490, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Conyers Esq. um 1437 in Sockburn, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn 17 und seine Mutter Marjory Eure 24. Er hatte mit Lady Anne Bigod mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. September 1490 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Conyers Esq. è nato il circa 1437 nel Sockburn, Durham, England, il suo padre, Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Marjory Eure, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Lady Anne Bigod. Morì il 8 settembre 1490, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.Sockburn, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムソクブルン
ja.lifeSummary: William Conyers Esq.が約1437年にイギリスダルハムソクブルンで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburnは17歳，母Marjory Eureは24歳であった。彼はLady Anne Bigodとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1490年9月8日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Conyers Esq.(이)가 대략 1437년 영국 뒤람 속번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Eure(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Lady Anne Bigod(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 9월 8일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Conyers Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1437, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Eure, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Lady Anne Bigod. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1490, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Conyers Esq. родился около 1437 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Eure, 24. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Lady Anne Bigod. Он умер 8 сентября 1490 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Conyers Esq. nació aproximadamente 1437, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Marjory Eure, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Lady Anne Bigod. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1490, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
